ReT_stabilized.formula: solve(D_T W = 0 | W_flux + W_inst − v_target) where W_flux = ReT, W_inst = (flux·A / b3) · exp(−2π·ReT / b3), b3 = 24

VEV_gap_percent.formula: abs(ReT − v_target) / v_target · 100 with v_target = 174.033 GeV and b3 = 24 in the instanton exponent

y_e_hierarchy.formula: sqrt(2/3) * exp(-b3 / 24)  | T4 orbit amplitude · b3 ratio

C_a_gamma_gamma.formula: b3 / (2*pi) * exp(-Re(T) / 200)  -- anomaly coefficient from G2 bridge + triple-cycle intersections

axion_photon_coupling_summary.formula: g_a_gamma_gamma derived from b3 = 24 via G2 anomaly + Re(T)

f_a_GeV.formula: f_a from G2 volume Re(T); f_a depends on b3 via Re(T)

g_a_gamma_gamma_GeV.formula: (alpha_EM / (2*pi*f_a)) * C_a_gamma_gamma * S  -- C_a_gamma_gamma derived from b3 = 24 via G2 anomaly

D_top.formula: G2 entropy dilution D_top = exp(-b3 / 2) from associative 3-cycle volume Vol(Y3) = b3 / 2

epsilon_L.formula: CP-violating phase from G2 triple-cycle intersections: 0.01 * exp(-Re(T) / 100)

eta_B.formula: epsilon_L * (28/79) * exp(-b3/2) * (Gamma / H) from moduli decay + G2 dilution + sphaleron

full_baryogenesis_solution.formula: T1.2 canonical: v18 G2 cycle asymmetry + Jarlskog (secondary_estimate: Sprint 6.2 moduli decay + dilution + sphaleron)

value.eta_B_source: BaryonAsymmetryV18 (G2 cycle asymmetry + Jarlskog), T1.2 canonical
value.observed_comparison: eta_B ~ 6.19e-10 (canonical, v18 geometric) vs. observed 6.12e-10 -- within 3 % (1.6 sigma)

secondary_estimate.label: Sprint 6.2 moduli decay + G2 dilution + sphaleron
secondary_estimate.note: Cross-check value (~2.3e-10) -- factor ~2.6 below observation; retained for diagnostics. Canonical eta_B comes from BaryonAsymmetryV18.

H0_resolved_km_s_Mpc.formula: 73.04 + 5.8 * delta_w_mirror  -- H0 + DESI-linear-response shift (delta_w from b3 = 24 anchored mirror sector; magnitude currently ~10^13x too small to resolve tension)

S8_resolved.formula: 0.83 - 0.085 * delta_w_mirror  -- S8 + KiDS/DES growth-suppression (delta_w from b3 = 24 anchored mirror sector)

delta_w_mirror.formula: 0.012 * exp(-Re(T) / 200) * g_mirror  -- mirror-sector DE from Z2 bridge (Re(T) anchored at b3 = 24 via Sprint 4 #3)

full_cosmological_tension_resolution.formula: mirror DE / early DE from 27D bulk + Re(T); Re(T) anchored at b3 = 24 (Sprint 4 #3); DOCUMENTED_TENSION -- magnitudes ~10^13x too small

n_s.formula: Canonical: 1 - 2*phi^2/chi_eff = 1 - 2/55 where chi_eff = 6*b3 = 144 (GeometricAnchors). Slow-roll diagnostic: 1 - 6*epsilon + 2*eta where epsilon = 3 / (2*ReT^2), eta = -1.5 / ReT^2, ReT inherits from Sprint 4 Re(T) stabilization with b3 = 24.

r.formula: 16 * epsilon where epsilon = 3 / (2*ReT^2) and ReT inherits from Sprint 4 Re(T) stabilization with b3 = 24

full_higgs_sector.formula: derived from Re(T) soft terms + MSSM potential; b3-seeded

value.higgs_sector_status: matches observed 125 GeV within radiative corrections (predicted 125.08 GeV vs observed 125.10 +/- 0.14 GeV)
value.status: matches observed 125 GeV within radiative corrections (predicted 125.08 GeV vs observed 125.10 +/- 0.14 GeV)

m_h_GeV.formula: MSSM CP-even mass-matrix diagonalisation + stop-loop correction; m_h^2 = m_h_tree^2(B_mu, tan_beta, m_Z) + delta_radiative^2; soft terms seeded by b3=24 via Re(T) sector

m_h_divergence.formula: template formula sqrt(0.5*(B_mu/v + mu^2) + 35^2) vs observed 125.10 GeV

v_EW_GeV.formula: minimum of MSSM Higgs potential from b3-seeded soft terms

mirror_dm_relic.formula: 2.74e8 * m_mirror * Y_today | full freeze-out from Z2 bridge (b3=24)

omega_mirror_h2.formula: solve Boltzmann + bridge_coupling from G2 cycles | b3=24 rooted via re_t_sector

m_lightest_eV.formula: (b3 / 24) * m_seed  -- lightest neutrino mass anchored to b3 = 24 seed via G2 triple-cycle Yukawa

refined_neutrino_sum_mass.formula: geometric PMNS sum + Z2 mirror correction from G2 bridge [b3 = 24]

sigma_m_base_eV.formula: m1 + m2 + m3 (inverted) from geometric Yukawas + G2 cycles [b3 = 24]

ledger_summary.formula: full registry audit + Bayesian Gaussian-prior scan (sigma=1%, N=1000)

status_count_eml_deferred.formula: count of registry params classified as eml_deferred

status_count_experimental_anchor.formula: count of registry params classified as experimental_anchor

status_count_fitted.formula: count of registry params classified as fitted

status_count_fully_derived.formula: count of registry params classified as fully_derived

status_count_numerical_agreement.formula: count of registry params classified as numerical_agreement

status_count_open_tension.formula: count of registry params classified as open_tension

A_0.formula: -3 * m_3_2 (moduli Kahler potential expansion; b3 seeded)

B_mu.formula: m_3_2 * mu (standard G_2 result; b3 seeded)

full_soft_spectrum.formula: complete moduli-mediated soft terms (incl. A_0 and B_mu) scaled by Planck mass 1e16 GeV; b3-seeded

m_3_2.formula: exp(-2*pi*Re(T)/b3) (|W_flux + W_inst| from Re(T) stabilization); SPRINT6_OPEN_TENSION: at v25.0 default Re(T)=174.033, b3=24 -> m_3_2 ~ 160 keV, not TeV; full TeV result requires e^{K/2}|W| Kahler structure (v27.0 task)

f_a_GeV.formula: (b3 / (2*pi)) * M_scale  -- decay constant from G2 volume Re(T)

strong_cp_solution.formula: full axion relaxation: theta_eff = 0 from G2 instantons; f_a derived from b3 via Re(T)

theta_QCD_eff.formula: min V(a) = Lambda^4 (1 - cos(a/f_a + theta_QCD))  -- f_a from b3 = 24 via Re(T)
